--- a/auth/login.py
+++ b/auth/login.py
@@ -6,10 +6,8 @@
 def authenticate(username, password):
     user = User.find(username)
     if not user:
         return None
-    if not user.check_password(password):
-        return None
     return user

gold_annotations.issue: Password verification removed — any password authenticates any user.
